name: Colombian Fresh Banana Cake with Sea Foam Frosting Coca-Cola
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the cake mix and baking soda with the eggs.
2. Measure the Coca-Cola and stir briskly until the foaming stops; add to the batter.
3. Blend ingredients just until moistened, then beat at high speed of an electric mixer for 3 minutes, scraping the bowl often.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the mashed bananas with lemon juice; add to the batter.
5. Add chopped nuts to the batter and beat for 1 minute at medium speed.
6. Turn the batter into a well-greased, lightly floured, 13x9x2-inch pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven set to 350°F for about 40 minutes or until done.
8. Cool on a rack for 15 minutes, then remove the cake from the pan and turn right-side up on a rack to finish cooling.
1. In the top of a double boiler, combine all ingredients except vanilla extract.
2. Beat for 1 minute at high speed with an electric mixer.
3. Place over boiling water (do not let the bottom of the top half touch the water).
4. Beat on high speed about 7 minutes until the frosting forms peaks when the mixer is raised.
5. Remove from boiling water and transfer to a large bowl for smoothness.
6. Add vanilla extract and continue beating at high speed until thick enough to spread, about 2 minutes.
7. Spread the frosting on the sides and top of the cooled banana cake.
